texto: There is work that is work and there is play that is play
autor: there is play that is work and work that is play. And in only one of these lies happiness.
explicacao: Citação de there is play that is work and work that is play. And in only one of these lies happiness. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is work that is work and there is play that is play” articula reflexao, gelett-burgess, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
